sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76253" key="o)xloloi/doros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀχλο-λοίδορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76253.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reviling the mob</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
